## Identity

---

## Professional Experience

### Software Engineer — ContextQA (July 2025 – Present)
**Company:** https://contextqa.com
**Stack:** Next.js, TailwindCSS, Shadcn UI, Node.js, Express.js, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Prisma, Chrome Extensions

Delivered two production-ready Chrome extensions:

**Vibe Testing:** AI-driven Chrome extension for automated web testing. Features real-time WebSocket log streaming, AI-generated bug reports with screenshots, integration with platforms like v0, Lovable, Replit. Backend: Python AI agent + Node.js + Socket.io.

**AxeTos:** Comprehensive WCAG A/AA/AAA accessibility testing Chrome extension. Features component-level visualization, intelligent fix suggestions, automated script generation. Backend: Node.js, Express.js, axe-core, AWS S3.

Also enhanced the ContextQA Portal backend using Node.js, Express.js, and Playwright — resolving critical bugs and implementing new features.

---

### Software Developer — eSparkBiz Technologies (August 2024 – July 2025)
**Company:** https://www.esparkinfo.com/
**Stack:** React.js, Node.js, Express.js, TailwindCSS, PostgreSQL, Supabase, OAuth, Stripe, Firebase

Key projects:
- **Brightmont:** Education scheduling platform with Python-based Cplex scheduling, AWS S3 storage, real-time calendar UI
- **The ASL Shop:** American Sign Language e-learning platform with Supabase auth, Dictionary module, course/quiz features
- **Proleven:** Corporate training platform bug fixes and email workflow improvements

---

### Software Developer Intern — eSparkBiz Technologies (January 2024 – August 2024)
**Stack:** HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript, Node.js, Express.js, React.js, Next.js, NestJS, MySQL, PostgreSQL, TailwindCSS, Redux

Owned authentication module on Garage Management System team project (role-based access control). Built practice e-commerce projects to solidify full-stack fundamentals.

---

## Projects

### EduScale
**Live:** https://eduscale.vercel.app/
**GitHub:** https://github.com/Shailesh93602/devscale
**Stack:** Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Prisma, PostgreSQL, Supabase, Socket.io, Redis, Node.js, Express.js

Premium engineering learning platform with:
- Real-time Coding Battle Zone: Redis pub/sub message broker, Bull queues, <200ms sync latency via Socket.io
- Dynamic Career Roadmaps with personalized learning paths
- Sub-second code execution engine
- Community Forum and Placement preparation tracks
- Gamified challenges and badges

Architecture: Frontend (Next.js 15 + Server Components) → Backend (Node.js + Express + Prisma) → Infrastructure (Supabase Auth + Redis + PostgreSQL)

---

### DevTrack
**Live:** https://daily-dev-track.vercel.app
**GitHub:** https://github.com/Shailesh93602/devtrack
**Stack:** Next.js, TypeScript, Prisma, PostgreSQL, Supabase, Tailwind CSS, Shadcn UI, Recharts

Developer intelligence dashboard featuring:
- Developer Scoring System (0–100 composite score)
- Pattern Analysis detecting optimal productivity windows
- Prescriptive Recommendations based on behavior data
- Visual Analytics with interactive charts (<300ms dashboard latency)

---

### KhataGO
**Live:** https://khatago.vercel.app/
**GitHub:** https://github.com/Shailesh93602/khatago
**Stack:** Next.js, TypeScript, Prisma, PostgreSQL, Supabase, Gemini AI, WhatsApp Cloud API, Redis, Bull Queues, i18n

WhatsApp-first AI accounting platform for small businesses:
- Natural Language WhatsApp Bot processing business transactions
- AI Receipt Processing with OCR via Gemini AI
- CA & Accountant Portal with role-based access
- Dynamic i18n supporting 3+ languages
- Event-driven architecture with Redis/Bull background tasks

---

### Vibe Testing (ContextQA — proprietary)
**Stack:** Chrome Extension, Python AI Agent, Node.js, Socket.io, WebSockets, TypeScript

AI-powered web testing extension:
- Autonomous UI test generation and execution
- Real-time log streaming via Socket.io
- Broken link detection and WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility checks
- Integration with AI platforms (v0, Lovable, Replit)
- Chat-based bug-fix workflows

---

### AxeTos (ContextQA — proprietary)
**Stack:** Chrome Extension, Node.js, Express.js, axe-core, AWS S3, TypeScript

Professional WCAG accessibility testing suite:
- Automated WCAG A/AA/AAA auditing
- Component-level visualization of accessibility issues
- Intelligent fix suggestions with code snippets
- Automated remediation script generation
- High-performance backend on Node.js/Express

---

**Specialized:** WCAG Accessibility, OAuth, Stripe, WhatsApp Cloud API, Gemini AI, i18n, Chrome Extensions, Real-time Systems
